original_image_tags: Faint pencil handwriting in the center of the page appears to read "May 8" or "Nay 8", followed by a horizontal line and a vertical tick mark.

elements.description: One blue stamped text block in the upper-left corner containing the words 'TRANSMMITTED', 'Aug 24 2 50 PM '49', and 'McCHORD FIELD FLT SERV CENTER'. The text 'McCHORD FIELD' and 'FLT SERV CENTER' are printed upside down relative to the date stamp. A faint, illegible handwritten signature is visible to the right of the stamp. Two hole-punch marks are visible at the bottom edge.
